name: Doggins
short_description: A point-and-sniff adventure. Explore the moon, sniff some things. Unravel the plot of a villainous squirrel to sabotage the history of human invention.
detailed_description:
Explore the moon, sniff some things. Unravel the plot of a villainous squirrel to sabotage the history of human invention.

Doggins is a tiny snack of an adventure game, playable in a single sitting or enjoyed more slowly. The game features a fresh take on classic item-based puzzles, along with immersive visual storytelling and handcrafted animation.

Created by married duo Brain&Brain and inspired by their own indomitable cairn terrier, Doggins was first released in 2014 and now makes its debut on desktop with this 10th anniversary release.
